LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THE BEST SERVICE CO.'S MOTION TO AMEND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THIS MATTER WAS ORIGINALLY SET FOR HEARING ON JANUARY 16, 2013. BEST SERVICE CO. FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER ON JANUARY 16, 2013 CONTINUING THIS MATTER UNTIL FEBRUARY 1, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M. TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE COURT ORDER STATED IN PART THAT "PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HIS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2013 AT 4P.M., OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED." PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S JANUARY 16, 2013 ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Chanh Cu, defendant appearing on his own behalf (no card);
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF THE BEST SERVICE CO.'s Motion To Amend Renewal Of Judgment is Denied without prejudice. This matter was originally set for hearing on January 16, 2013. Best Service Co. failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B. The Court issued an order on January 16, 2013 continuing this matter until February 1, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The Court order stated in part that "Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of his moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than January 18, 2013 at 4p.m., or the motion will be denied." Plaintiff has failed to provide courtesy copies of the papers in compliance with Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's January 16, 2013 order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Feb-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified. PLAINTIFF THE BEST SERVICE CO.'s Motion To Amend Renewal Of Judgment is continued on the court's own motion to February 1, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of his moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than January 18, 2013 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
